task: Find everything relevant to completing the Lalin-native Lua 5.5 VM under one concrete definition of complete: this implementation can run Lua 5.5 programs with correct VM semantics through its own Lalin-native runtime, while SponJIT remains separate. Treat the prior VM contract milestone as background but start this as a new workflow. Gather facts about the current implementation, what is already done, all remaining runtime/compiler/semantic/test gaps, dependency clusters, stubs, TODOs, and verification evidence needed for completion.
